title: Vectors, Matrices, Transformations, and Data Systems · Worked Case: Linear Transformations
summary: Represent flows and transformations across a small service system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int linear transformations increment in a matrix-based flow and transformation model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret matrices as transformations of vectors and coordinate systems.
Use matrix dimensions to validate addition, multiplication, and transformations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
